prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon runner needing carb-loading strategy for race tomorrow morning at 7 AM

solution_criteria: Emphasizes high carbohydrate foods throughout the day
Includes easily digestible dinner to avoid race day stomach issues
Avoids dairy products in all meals
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a marathon runner who needs high carbohydrate intake and has a morning race the next day

prompt_inputs.goal: Powerlifting cutting phase - high protein, low calorie deficit while maintaining strength

solution_criteria: High protein content appropriate for powerlifter cutting phase
Contains no nuts or nut-based products
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a powerlifter in cutting phase who requires high protein, low calorie intake, and has a nut allergy

prompt_inputs.goal: Olympic swimmer in heavy training phase requiring 5000+ calories daily

solution_criteria: Includes protein sources suitable for athletic performance
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with an Olympic swimmer during heavy training who needs 5000+ calories and is vegetarian
